hypothesis: Harness is correct: clean test accuracy matches the closed-form prediction Phi(1) ~= 0.841 within sampling error.
title: Clean nearest-centroid baseline

hypothesis: Random L2 noise at eps=1.0 costs only a few points of accuracy in d=32, because the effective shift along the class axis is ~eps/sqrt(d) ~= 0.18.
title: Random isotropic noise at budget eps

hypothesis: Targeted noise at the same budget collapses accuracy toward the closed-form Phi(1-eps): ~0.69 at eps=0.5, ~0.50 at eps=1.0 - far below random at equal budget.
title: Targeted noise along the inter-class axis
